name: AQICN Air Quality Index API
description: Air Quality Index data for over 1000 cities worldwide. Provides real-time AQI data, individual pollutant readings (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, CO, SO2, Ozone), weather conditions, and air quality forecasts. Also known as the WAQI (World Air Quality Index) API.
